subcodes.first_line: O maidservant of Bahá! For some time no word hath come from thee, though 'Abdu'l-Bahá doth make mention of thee in every moment [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امه البهاء مدتیست از شما خبری نمیرسد و عبدالبهاء در هر آن ذکر ترا نماید و در نزد
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @thankfulness; gratitude, @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @love as fire
